metadata.description: Diagnostic chains extracted from DGT ITI syllabi via LLM (T103b)
metadata.supersedes: iti_diagnostics.json (hand-curated v1 retained as fallback per ADR 008)

chains.symptom: Abnormal engine noise
diagnosis_steps: Use engineer's stethoscope to localize noise
Check big-end and main bearing wear
Listen for knocking vs ticking vs whining

chains.symptom: Abnormal noise from compressor / magnetic clutch / blower
Abnormal tyre wear / wheel wobbling / poor self-centering / hard steering / vehicle pulling to one side
diagnosis_steps: Inspect chassis frame for bends or cracks
Check wheel alignment (toe-in, toe-out, camber, caster, king pin inclination)
Check tie rod ends and ball joints

chains.symptom: AC - abnormal noise from compressor, magnetic clutch, condenser, evaporator or blower motor
diagnosis_steps: Check blower motor bearing and cage

chains.symptom: AC - high-side pressure too high/low or low-side pressure too high/low
AC - no cooling / intermittent cooling / insufficient cooling
diagnosis_steps: Check refrigerant charge with gauge set

chains.symptom: AC not cooling / HVAC insufficient cooling
Accelerator pedal problem / no throttle response
diagnosis_steps: Verify CAN message to motor controller

chains.symptom: Air in fuel lines (hard starting, stalling)
diagnosis_steps: Use priming/hand pump to bleed air from fuel lines
Service primary and secondary fuel filters

chains.symptom: Airbag / automatic seat belt system fault (error indication)
diagnosis_steps: Read SRS DTCs with scan tool

chains.symptom: all lights come on but dimly when ignition switch is turned ON
All power windows do not operate
Back-up / reverse lights do not light
battery drain / parasitic draw / battery not charging
diagnosis_steps: Clean and top up lead acid battery
Test alternator output and regulator unit

chains.symptom: Battery not charging / undercharge
diagnosis_steps: Inspect rotor and stator for open/ground

chains.symptom: Battery range dropped / reduced range
diagnosis_steps: Read BMS for SoH (State of Health)
Check cell balance / delta voltage across cells
Map battery SoH against cycle count

chains.symptom: brake ineffective / spongy pedal
diagnosis_steps: Overhaul brakes including cleaning and inspection
Reline brake shoes, set actuating clearance
Inspect hydraulic brake cylinder and replace washers/oil seals
Skim brake drum or disc plate if warped

chains.symptom: Brake lights do not light up
diagnosis_steps: Check brake light switch at pedal

chains.symptom: Brake lights stay on
Brake not working / brake failure
Brake / parking brake warning light - does not illuminate on low fluid or parking brake pull, or stays on
Brake warning light does not light when parking brake pulled
Brake warning light stays on
Braking system trouble - hard pedal / no brakes / air brake leak
diagnosis_steps: Inspect master cylinder and wheel cylinders
Check brake pads and shoes for wear
Locate air leaks in air brake lines

chains.symptom: cam chain noise
diagnosis_steps: inspect cam chain tensioner spring and pushrod

chains.symptom: cam chain slack excessively
chain slipping / slack
Charger not delivering current / not charging
diagnosis_steps: Check charger type and voltage level compatibility
Verify contactor closing on charge request
Test OBC output with DC meter
Check BMS SoC; may be at limit

chains.symptom: Charger not responding
diagnosis_steps: Verify AC input voltage at charging station
Check charging port integrity and pin continuity
Check CAN communication between OBC and BMS

chains.symptom: Charging system fault (battery not charging)
diagnosis_steps: Trace circuit from alternator to battery
Check drive belt condition and tension

chains.symptom: Charging system - undercharge / no charge / overcharge
diagnosis_steps: Check warning lamp behaviour with ignition on and running
Inspect drive belt tension and condition
Check slip ring surface and brush length

chains.symptom: Charging warning lamp does not glow when ignition on
diagnosis_steps: Check wiring to alternator L terminal

chains.symptom: Charging warning lamp stays on while alternator running
Clearance, tail & license plate lights - all or some lights do not light up
Clutch slip / clutch noise / clutch binding / hard clutch
diagnosis_steps: Check pressure plate diaphragm and fingers
Check pilot bearing and throw-out bearing

chains.symptom: clutch slip when accelerating
clutch slipping or clutch pedal free play incorrect
diagnosis_steps: Dismantle and inspect clutch plate for wear
Inspect pressure plate and release bearing
Check slave cylinder and oil seal

chains.symptom: clutch will not disengage
Coolant temperature meter shows no operation
Cylinder head warped / head gasket leak
diagnosis_steps: Check cylinder head flatness with straightedge + feeler gauge
Inspect head and manifold surfaces for warping/cracks

chains.symptom: dashboard gauge showing incorrect reading
diagnosis_steps: Identify different gauges fitted on dashboard
Perform daily checks before starting engine
Record reading and compare with standard

chains.symptom: DC-DC converter fault / 12V battery not charging while driving
diagnosis_steps: Measure 12V battery voltage with vehicle in Ready state

chains.symptom: Defective battery module / module replacement needed
diagnosis_steps: Identify failing module via BMS cell voltage logs

chains.symptom: diesel engine hard to start or air lock in fuel system
diagnosis_steps: Check for leakages in diesel fuel line
Bleed the fuel system to vent trapped air
Test injectors for spray pattern and pressure

chains.symptom: differential or final drive noise / wheel traction loss
diagnosis_steps: Adjust crown wheel and pinion backlash
Service reduction gear and rear axle wheel hub

chains.symptom: engine compression low / unusual noise and knocks
diagnosis_steps: Inspect piston rings, ring gap, piston skirt
Measure cylinder liner ovality and taper
Check connecting rod bend and twist

chains.symptom: Engine coolant temperature meter shows no operation or incorrect operation
diagnosis_steps: Test ECT sensor resistance at known temperature

chains.symptom: Engine cranks but will not start
Engine cranks but will not start or hard to start
diagnosis_steps: Check spark plug condition and gap
Check Hall effect / crank position sensor

chains.symptom: engine cranks but would not start
diagnosis_steps: check fuel flow at petrol tap

chains.symptom: engine idles roughly / stalls
Engine not starting (cold/diesel)
diagnosis_steps: Check mechanical causes: fuel delivery, FIP operation, injector condition, injection timing
Check electrical causes: battery, starter motor, solenoid, glow plug circuit
Bleed air from fuel lines if air entered system
Test glow plugs with glow plug tester (especially in cold conditions)
Test injectors for spray pattern on injector testing set
Verify injection timing via spill cut-off method

chains.symptom: Engine overheating
diagnosis_steps: Pressure test cooling system for leaks
Check coolant level and top up if required
Reverse flush cooling system if blocked
check engine oil level and grade

chains.symptom: engine overheating or undercooling
diagnosis_steps: Reverse-flush cooling system with flushing solution
Test thermostat valve for proper opening temperature
Check radiator cap for pressure holding
Check water pump for leaks and impeller wear

chains.symptom: Engine poor performance / poor fuel economy
diagnosis_steps: Connect scan tool and read DTCs via DLC
Test reference voltage and continuity of sensor circuits
Test sensors (MAP, MAF, O2, TPS, CKP, CMP) with multimeter/scan tool
Erase error memory after repair and retest

chains.symptom: engine starts but runs poorly (ignition)
Engine will not start
diagnosis_steps: Investigate mechanical causes (compression, timing, fuel delivery)
Investigate electrical causes (battery, starter, ignition, wiring)
Use scan tool via DLC to read DTCs
Check reference voltage and continuity of circuits

chains.symptom: EVAP system fault
diagnosis_steps: Inspect EVAP canister purge with scan tool

chains.symptom: Excessive engine oil consumption
diagnosis_steps: Check piston rings end-gap and piston-to-liner clearance
Check for turbocharger seal leak (oil in intake)
Inspect cylinder liner for wear / taper / ovality

chains.symptom: Excessive key-off battery drain (parasitic draw)
diagnosis_steps: Pull fuses one by one to isolate circuit
Isolate circuits by pulling fuses one at a time
Test relays and solenoids for stuck-on condition

chains.symptom: Excessive oil consumption
diagnosis_steps: Inspect piston rings and cylinder liner wear

chains.symptom: excessive smoke
exhaust leakage or noise
diagnosis_steps: Check exhaust leakages and rubber mounting

chains.symptom: front suspension noise
front wheel wobbling
Fuel level meter shows no operation
Fuel meter shows incorrect operation
Fuel meter shows no operation or incorrect operation
diagnosis_steps: Test fuel gauge sender unit resistance
Check wiring continuity between sender and gauge

chains.symptom: Gearbox noise / gear slip / rear axle noise / propeller shaft noise / universal joint noise / differential noise
diagnosis_steps: Identify noise source by driving conditions (coast/drive/turn)
Inspect gear teeth and bearings in gearbox
Check propeller shaft balance and U-joints

chains.symptom: gearshift pedal does not return
hard steering
hard steering or excessive steering play
diagnosis_steps: Inspect steering linkages for excessive play
Check and adjust tie-rod and ball joints
Remove and repair front axle assembly
For hydraulic steering: check pump pressure, distributor valves, hoses

chains.symptom: hard suspension
hard to shift
headlight beams do not shift when HI-LO switch operated
Headlights do not light up
High engine oil pressure
diagnosis_steps: Check oil pressure relief valve (stuck closed)

chains.symptom: High exhaust smoke / failed emission test
diagnosis_steps: Measure smoke opacity with diesel smoke meter

chains.symptom: High fuel consumption
diagnosis_steps: Inspect air filter (clogged filter richens mixture)
Test injectors for leakage / bad spray pattern
Check FIP calibration on test bench
Check for exhaust smoke (black smoke = over-fuelling)
Check O2 sensor and fuel trims via scan tool

chains.symptom: high oil consumption
diagnosis_steps: Check piston rings for wear and ring gap
Inspect cylinder liner for ovality and taper

chains.symptom: Horn - no operation, poor sound quality, or sounds continuously
diagnosis_steps: Check horn switch in steering wheel

chains.symptom: HV battery overheating / thermal warning
diagnosis_steps: Inspect temperature sensor readings in BMS

chains.symptom: HV isolation fault / HV leakage warning
diagnosis_steps: Perform megger insulation test on HV cables
Isolate pack, OBC, DC-DC one by one

chains.symptom: hydraulic lift not working / 3-point hitch won't raise
diagnosis_steps: Check hydraulic fluid level and quality
Trace hydraulic circuit to hydraulic lift

chains.symptom: implement not hitching or operating correctly
diagnosis_steps: Check plough, harrow, cultivator, seed drill, trailer for serviceability
Perform hitching practice (single and three point)
Adjust implements for correct field operation

chains.symptom: Insufficient cooling from AC
Interior light does not light up
Intermittent cooling from AC
Inverter fault / inverter warning lamp
diagnosis_steps: Scan inverter DTCs with scan tool
Check inverter coolant level and temperature
Verify HV bus voltage into inverter

chains.symptom: Inverter/motor overheating
diagnosis_steps: Check coolant flow and air lock

chains.symptom: Key-off battery drain
key-off battery drain (parasitic draw)
kick start not working
knocking or abnormal noise
diagnosis_steps: check connecting rod big end play

chains.symptom: lean mixture
diagnosis_steps: check air leak at inlet manifold

chains.symptom: low compression
Low engine oil pressure
diagnosis_steps: Check engine oil level and grade
Inspect main and big-end bearings for wear
Inspect oil filter and pickup tube for blockage

chains.symptom: Low / high engine oil pressure
diagnosis_steps: Check engine oil level and grade
Measure oil pressure at various RPMs
Check main and big end bearing clearance

chains.symptom: low or high engine oil pressure
diagnosis_steps: Check engine oil level and grade (SAE spec)
Check for worn bearings causing low pressure

chains.symptom: Low power generation
diagnosis_steps: Inspect turbocharger for axial clearance / leaks
Check EGR valve for stuck open
Check air intake and exhaust for restriction

chains.symptom: misfiring
Missing cylinder / rough running
diagnosis_steps: Isolate each injector one by one to find defective cylinder
Check cylinder compression on suspect cylinder

chains.symptom: Motor not spinning / inoperative drive motor
diagnosis_steps: Check accelerator pedal input on CAN

chains.symptom: motorcycle creeps with clutch disengaged
No cooling from AC
diagnosis_steps: Check refrigerant charge via pressure gauges

chains.symptom: No horn operation / poor sound / horn sounds continuously
No horn / poor horn / continuous horn
no lights come on when ignition switch is turned ON
no sparks at plugs
No turn signal flashing
oil contamination
diagnosis_steps: check head gasket for coolant/fuel ingress

chains.symptom: oil level too low
diagnosis_steps: check for leakage at oil seals

chains.symptom: Oil pressure warning light does not glow
Oil pressure warning light does not light up when ignition on at engine off
Only one beam (High or Low) does not light
Only one headlight does not light up
Overcharge condition
parking brake not holding
diagnosis_steps: Inspect spring of shoe and lever

chains.symptom: poor fuel economy or engine performance
diagnosis_steps: Obtain and interpret scan tool data (if electronic control)

chains.symptom: Poor fuel economy or poor engine performance
diagnosis_steps: Scan for DTCs using scan tool

chains.symptom: poor idling
power tiller will not steer / field operation issues
diagnosis_steps: Carry out field operation check without and with implements

chains.symptom: Power window or power door lock - no operation
PTO not engaging or PTO shaft rpm incorrect
diagnosis_steps: Measure rpm of PTO shaft against standard

chains.symptom: Regen braking not working
diagnosis_steps: Verify BMS is accepting regen current (SoC not at 100%)
Check battery temperature (regen disabled when cold)
Scan controller for regen inhibit flags

chains.symptom: Remote keyless entry / immobilizer no operation
diagnosis_steps: Check antenna coil around ignition lock

chains.symptom: rich mixture
self start not cranking
soft suspension
Some power window switches do not operate
Speedometer shows no operation
Starter motor does not run
diagnosis_steps: Test solenoid pull-in and hold-in coils

chains.symptom: Starter motor does not stop running after key release
Starter motor fails to crank
diagnosis_steps: Overhaul starter motor: brushes, armature, bearings

chains.symptom: starter motor not cranking
Starter motor not running / too slow / runs but not cranking / noise / does not stop running
diagnosis_steps: Perform pull-in test, hold-in test, pinion return test, no-load test on starter
Jump-start to isolate battery vs starter

chains.symptom: Starter motor runs but too slow (low torque)
diagnosis_steps: Test armature for shorts using growler

chains.symptom: Starter runs but does not crank engine
Steering wheel feels heavy at low speed
diagnosis_steps: Check EPS motor and torque sensor

chains.symptom: steers to one side / does not track straight
Suspension defects - wheel hop / unequal ride height / noises / fluid leakage / excessive travel / bounce / vehicle crabbing
diagnosis_steps: Check for worn joints and damaged linkages
Inspect shock absorber for fluid leakage
Measure ride height left vs right

chains.symptom: transmission jumps out of gear
diagnosis_steps: check dog clutch wear on gears

chains.symptom: Turbocharger malfunction (boost loss / oil leak / whine)
diagnosis_steps: Check axial clearance per service manual
Inspect for oil leak at seals

chains.symptom: turbocharger underperformance or axial play
diagnosis_steps: Check axial clearance per service manual

chains.symptom: Turn signal flash rate high or one side flashes only
diagnosis_steps: Replace burnt turn bulb on affected side

chains.symptom: Turn signal / hazard warning - flash rate high, one-side only, no flashing, flash rate low
tyre wear abnormal or incorrect inflation
diagnosis_steps: Check tyre pressure against manufacturer recommendation
Balance tractor wheels, practice tyre rotation
Tighten wheel nuts in correct sequence

chains.symptom: tyre wear patterns abnormal
Vehicle pulls to one side during straight driving
Vehicle will not go into Ready / no power
Windshield washer does not spray
Windshield wiper no operation / intermittent / continuous / will not park
Windshield wiper/washer - no operation, intermittent, continuous, or wipers will not park
Wiper no operation / continuous / intermittent fault
